## Summary

Describe the public-core change in one or two sentences.

## Area

- [ ] Manifest
- [ ] Verification
- [ ] GitHub adapter
- [ ] Built-in agents
- [ ] Public UI/docs
- [ ] QA
- [ ] Other

## QA

- [ ] `npm run qa:docs`
- [ ] `npm run qa:manifest-validation`
- [ ] `npm run qa:manifest-draft`
- [ ] `npm run qa:github-adapter`
- [ ] `npm run qa:ui`
- [ ] `npm run qa:open-core`
- [ ] `npm run qa:all`

## Open-Core Safety

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, private repo data, customer data, or local machine artifacts are included.
- [ ] The change does not depend on private billing, payout, or live runtime internals.
- [ ] Public docs and examples still match the open-core boundary.
